metadata.description: Week 1 QA evaluation dataset for retrieval and citation quality testing
metadata.instructions: Use these questions to test hybrid retrieval, reranking, and citation accuracy. For each question, the system should return citations with >90% relevance and confidence scores.

test_cases.question: What is the main topic of this book?
test_cases.notes: Tests book-level understanding; should return citations from intro/summary sections

test_cases.question: How is [key concept] defined?
test_cases.notes: Tests exact definition retrieval; BM25 should help here

test_cases.question: What are the main steps involved in [process]?
Explain the difference between [concept A] and [concept B]?
test_cases.notes: Tests nuanced semantic understanding; vector search should help

test_cases.question: What is an example of [concept] mentioned in the book?
Who discovered/created [important thing]?
test_cases.notes: Tests factual retrieval; BM25 should excel here

test_cases.question: What are the advantages of [approach]?
test_cases.notes: Tests analytical synthesis from multiple sources

test_cases.question: What are the limitations or challenges mentioned regarding [topic]?
test_cases.notes: Tests critical thinking retrieval; may return lower confidence on nuanced topics

test_cases.question: How does [component] relate to [other component]?
test_cases.notes: Tests relationship understanding; hybrid approach should help

test_cases.question: What should I do if [problem] occurs?
Which section of the book covers [topic]?
What is the formula or equation for [calculation]?
test_cases.notes: Tests technical retrieval; should handle code/formulas

test_cases.question: What is the author's opinion on [controversial topic]?
test_cases.notes: Tests nuanced opinion retrieval; may have lower confidence

evaluation_metrics.citation_coverage: Percentage of answers with >= expected_citation_count citations
evaluation_metrics.confidence_calibration: Percentage of answers meeting min_confidence threshold
evaluation_metrics.hallucination_rate: Percentage of answers with insufficient_evidence=false but confidence < 0.3
evaluation_metrics.citation_precision: Percentage of citations that are relevant to the question
evaluation_metrics.reranking_lift: Improvement in citation relevance after reranking vs before

setup: Upload or use existing test book
execution: Record: question, answer, citations, confidence, insufficient_evidence
Check citation relevance manually or with scorer
validation: No answers with high confidence but low evidence
Insufficient_evidence flag correctly reflects weak evidence
